result:
Results for 'top attractions and restaurants in Hyderabad' in Hyderabad, India:
1. Thrill City [Theme park] ⭐ 4.5 (14000 reviews)
   📍 railway station, 1233, PV Narasimha Rao Marg, opp. to Sanjeeviah Park
   "This is one of the best places that I visited in Hyderabad."
2. Exotica Banjara Hills [North Indian] ⭐ 4.3 (11000 reviews)
   📍 5th Floor, 12th Square Building
   "One of the finest places you must visit in Hyderabad if you are a foodie."
3. Ishtaa - Vegetarian Cuisine | Basheerbagh [Vegetarian] ⭐ 4.6 (11000 reviews) | ₹200–1,200
   🕐 5-10-173, VASANTHA CHAMBERS, Fateh Maidan Lane
   "Not to missed anytime whenever visiting Hyderabad."
4. Parampara - Flavours Of India [Vegetarian] ⭐ 4.6 (16000 reviews) | ₹400–1,400
   📍 ANR Centre, Road No. 1
   "One of must visit places for me when I am in Hyderabad"
5. Lake District Bar & Kitchen [Grill] ⭐ 4.1 (3000 reviews)
   📍 PV Narasimha Rao Marg, opp. Lake Police Station
   "One of the best places that I’ve visited in Hyderabad so far."
